text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now, Oguri Cap's training truly begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has always been quietly determined to
realize her dream of racing in central races and
making the people of her hometown proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first thing she has to do is make her debut.
Oguri Cap's epic tale is about to begin.
